introduction: A modular, web-based educational platform designed for English language learners. This system provides a central hub for students to access grammar theory, practice exercises, and level-specific (B1/B2) content, while offering educators a protected environment for assessment and answer management.

features.ui_ux: ✨ Beautiful gradient header with workbook title
features.content: 📖 Overview section explaining Present Simple usage
features.navigation: 🎯 4 navigation cards (Grammar, Exercises, B1, B2) with hover effects
features.accountability: ✓ Progress tracker with checklist for student accountability
features.utility: 🖨️ Print This Page button and 📅 Calendar date picker for worksheets

files.description: The entry point for students. Contains the main navigation and progress tracker.
Publicly accessible grammar rules and usage guide.
Standard practice exercises with open access for students.
Password-protected version of exercises (Default: teacher123) to control access to answers.
Instructions for file linking, password configuration, and deployment.

front_end: Vanilla JavaScript for UI interactions (Answer toggles, navigation)
back_end_logic: Modular dataset expansion for additional B1/B2 test content

purpose: To serve as a central hub where students can navigate seamlessly between theory and practice, while allowing teachers to build a scalable dataset of printable and digital learning materials.
